description: bspQA eval set — 15 BSP Monetary Policy Report Q&A cases

cases.question: What was the BSP's baseline inflation forecast for 2022 as of Q1 2022?
What was the BSP's overnight reverse repurchase (RRP) policy rate at the time of the Q1 2022 Monetary Policy Report?
What was the BSP's official core inflation figure for January 2023?
What was the target RRP rate as of the February 2024 Monetary Policy Report, and had it changed since the prior Monetary Board meeting?
What was the baseline inflation forecast for 2025 published in the December 2024 Monetary Policy Report?
How did the BSP's near-term inflation outlook change from Q1 2022 to Q1 2023?
How did the BSP's overnight RRP policy rate evolve from 2022 to end-2024, and what were the major turning points?
What was the trend in the BSP's reserve requirement ratio (RRR) from 2022 to 2024, and what was the stated rationale for any changes?
How did global oil price developments influence the BSP's inflation outlook differently in Q3 2022 versus Q4 2023?
What were the primary factors that led the BSP's Monetary Board to raise the RRP rate by 50 basis points in November 2022?
What economic and inflation conditions prompted the BSP to begin cutting its policy rate in August 2024?
What factors led the BSP to keep the policy rate unchanged at 6.50 percent through the first half of 2024?
What is the BSP's official stance on cryptocurrency regulation and Bitcoin as of 2024?
What were the key decisions made at the BSP Monetary Board meeting in March 2027?
How do BSP monetary policy decisions compare with those of the European Central Bank over the period 2022 to 2024?
